headline: BTQ Technologies' QPerfect Subsidiary and the University of Strasbourg Partner to Support France's First Public Neutral-Atom Quantum Computing Platform
summary: BTQ Technologies Corp. ("BTQ" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: BTQ) (CBOE CA: BTQ), a global quantum technology company focused on securing mission-critical networks, today announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, QPerfect, has entered into a research collaboration with the University of Strasbourg in support of aQCess, France's first publicly accessible neutral atom quantum computing platform.
